chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1893 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.12.2025 *** None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. The conduct displayed by the petitioner prima facie indicates that he has lost interest in the matter. Accordingly this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
